==Important Note!==
To finish the World Tour, you will need to Purchase the Value Packs with Athena Skin, Starry Poem(Harp), and any Value Pack containing Rainbow Points. It is, minimum, $50 to complete the World Tour.

==Main Screen==
[[File:EDM Festival.png|left]]
Sept. 29 - Oct. 12 2023 

===EDM Fest Sign-In===
Sign in everyday to claim rewards!<br>100 W-tads, 6,000 B-tads, 2h Gene Speedup

===Tour Shop===
Spend Tour Coins to buy event items! Unused Tour Coins will be converted into B-tads at the end of the event!
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Item
!Price
!Limit
|-
|{{Reimg|ANS Synthesizer}} +40 Frags
|15K
|1
|-
|{{Reimg|Conductor's Baton}} +5 Frags
|15K
|1
|-
|[[Gear|Eye of Horus]]
|15K
|1
|-
|Deluxe Sheet Music +80
|W-tad x1
|10 (1 a day)
|-
|Dragon Orb
|2K
|3
|-
|Incense
|1,800
|3
|-
|Lottery Ticket +5
|600
|3
|-
|Wish Coin +2
|600
|3
|-
|Travel Speedup +8h
|600
|3
|-
|Offering Speedup +8h
|300
|3
|-
|Gene Speedup +8h
|300
|3
|-
|Clone Speedup +8
|300
|3
|-
|Tool Chest +100
|500
|3
|-
|Fungus Chest +100
|500
|3
|-
|Gear Chest +100
|500
|3
|-
|Coating Bucket +3
|800
|3
|-
|Master Alchemy Case +3
|800
|3
|-
|Research Briefcase
|1K
|3
|-
|Glue +30
|150
|3
|-
|Organ Slime +50
|150
|3
|-
|Toner +30
|200
|3
|-
|B-tads +6K
|100
|10
|}

===Peter===
====EDM Gifts!====
Purchase with W-tads to get rewards for 3 days!<br>8K W-tads
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Day
!Rewards
|-
|1
|40 Rainbow Points, 50 Maintenance Oil, Da Beat (Instrument)
|-
|2
|3 Wish Coin, 50 Maintenance Oil, 10 Lottery Tickets
|-
|3
|[[ANS Synthesizer]], 50 Maintenance Oil, 3 [[Clover Vendor|Lucky Coin]]
|}
Purchase to get rewards for 3 days!<br>$49.99
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Day
!Rewards
|-
|1
|50 Rainbow Points, 15 Lottery Ticket, 1,500 W-tads
|-
|2
|[[ANS Synthesizer]], 15 Lottery Ticket, 1,500 W-tads
|-
|3
|[[Gear|Eye of Horus]], 15 Lottery Ticket, 1,500 W-tads
|}
Purchase any amount during the event to claim rewards!
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Day
!Rewards
|-
|1
|1 Lottery Ticket, 200 W-tads, 2h Offering Speedup
|-
|2
|1 Lottery Ticket, 200 W-tads, 2h Offering Speedup
|-
|3
|Band Agent(Avatar), 200 W-tads, 1 Lottery Ticket
|}

====Purchase Pack====
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Price
!Rewards
|-
|W-tads x2,000
|10 Lottery Tickets, Lee Gi-na Outfit
|-
|W-tads x3,000
|5 Wish Coin, 80 Deluxe Music Sheet, Idol Boy Outfit
|-
|$4.99
|Athena Outfit, 300 W-tads, 5 Lottery Tickets, 10 Rainbow Points
|-
|$14.99
|Starry Poem(Instrument), 7 Wish Coin, 1K W-tads, 20 Rainbow Points
|-
|$29.99
|3 Incense, 2d Offering Speedup, 2K W-tads, 30 Rainbow Points
|-
|$69.99
|18 Golden Pickaxes, 20 Wish Coins, 5K W-tads, 40 Rainbow Points
|-
|$99.99
|40 Grandmaster Scrolls, 60 Lottery Tickets, 8K W-tads, 50 Rainbow Points
|}
{{clear}}

==World Tour==
[[File:World Tour.png|left]]

===Instrument Modification===
All instruments have a max of 7 stars(25 Levels).<br>Each instrument takes 240 Maintenance Oil to max.
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Name
!Source
!Rewards
|-
|Starry Poem
|Purchase Pack $14.99
|W-tads, Glue, Tour Coins
|-
|Da Beat
|EDM Fest Gift, 8K W-tads, Day 1
|W-tads, Offering Speedup, Tour Coins
|-
|Electronic Player
|Tour Plan 18
|W-tads, Gene Speedup, Tour Coins
|-
|Celestial Tune
|Starting Instrument
|W-tads, Clone Speedup, Tour Coins
|-
|Echo MK2
|Starting Instrument
|W-tads, Refine Speedup, Tour Coins
|}

===Characters===
Character max level is 30, each level takes 10 Deluxe Sheet Music.<br>Each Character takes 300 Deluxe Sheet Music to max.
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Name
!Source
|-
|Athena
|Value Pack, $4.99
|-
|Lee Gi-na
|Value Pack, W-tad x2,000
|-
|Dracula
|Tour No. 27
|-
|Idol Boy
|Value Pack, W-tad x3,000
|-
|Hitman No. 1
|Tour No. 9
|}

===Tour Plan===
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Tour Stop
!Rewards
|-
|1
|B-tads +3,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +100
|-
|2
|B-tads +3,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +100
|-
|3
|W-tads +100, Gacha Coin +2, Gene Speedup +2h
|-
|4
|B-tads +3,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +150
|-
|5
|B-tads +3,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +150
|-
|6
|Evolution Chest +100, Gacha Coin +2, W-tads +150
|-
|7
|B-tads +4,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +200
|-
|8
|B-tads +4,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +200
|-
|9
|Hitman No. 1 Outfit, Gacha Coin +2, W-tads +200
|-
|10
|B-tads +4,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +250
|-
|11
|B-tads +4,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +250
|-
|12
|Tool Chest +100, Gacha Coin +2, W-tads +250
|-
|13
|B-tads +5,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +300
|-
|14
|B-tads +5,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +300
|-
|15
|Gene Speedup +3h, Gacha Coin +2, W-tads +300
|-
|16
|B-tads +5,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +350
|-
|17
|B-tads +5,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +350
|-
|18
|Electronic Player(Instrument), Gacha Coin +2, W-tads +350
|-
|19
|B-tads +6,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +400
|-
|20
|B-tads +6,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +400
|-
|21
|Novice Scroll +10, Gacha Coin +2, W-tads +400
|-
|22
|B-tads +6,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +450
|-
|23
|B-tads +6,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +450
|-
|24
|Lottery Ticket +2, Gacha Coin +2, W-tads +450
|-
|25
|B-tads +7,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +500
|-
|26
|B-tads +7,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +500
|-
|27
|Dracula Outfit, Gacha Coin +2, W-tads +500
|-
|28
|B-tads +7,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +550
|-
|29
|B-tads +7,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +550
|-
|30
|Travel Speedup +4h, Gacha Coin +2, W-tads +550
|-
|31
|B-tads +8,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +600
|-
|32
|B-tads +8,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +600
|-
|33
|Organ Chest +100, Gacha Coin +2, W-tads +600
|-
|34
|B-tads +8,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +650
|-
|35
|B-tads +8,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +650
|-
|36
|Expert Scrolls +20, Gacha Coin +3, W-tads +650
|-
|37
|B-tads +9,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +700
|-
|38
|B-tads +9,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +700
|-
|39
|Wish Coin +2, Gacha Coin +3, W-tads +700
|-
|40
|B-tads +9,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +750
|-
|41
|B-tads +9,000, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +750
|-
|42
|Incense, Gacha Coin +3, W-tads +750
|-
|43
|B-tads +10K, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +800
|-
|44
|B-tads +10K, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +80
|-
|45
|Lucky Coin +5, Gacha Coin +3, W-tads +800
|-
|46
|B-tads +10K, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +900
|-
|47
|B-tads +10K, Gacha Coin, Tour Coin +900
|-
|48
|Dragon Orb, Gacha Coin +5. W-tads +900
|-
|49
|Singularity Crystal, Gacha Coin +5, W-tads +1,000
|}

===Point Gift===
====Tour Point====
Per completed tour, you get 10 pts
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Points
!Rewards
|-
|20
|Tour Coin +200, Wish Coin, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|40
|Tour Coin +200, Wish Coin, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|60
|Rainbow Points +10, Wish Coin, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|80
|Tour Coin +200, Wish Coin, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|100
|Tour Coin +200, Wish Coin, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|120
|Rainbow Points +10, Wish Coin, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|140
|Tour Coin +300, Wish Coin, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|160
|Tour Coin +300, Wish Coin, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|180
|Rainbow Points +20, Wish Coin, Lottery Ticket +2
|-
|200
|Tour Coin +300, Wish Coin, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|220
|Tour Coin +300, Wish Coin, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|240
|W-tads +300, Wish Coin, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|260
|Tour Coin +400, Wish Coin +2, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|280
|Tour Coin +400, Wish Coin +2, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|300
|W-tads +400, Wish Coin +2, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|320
|Tour Coin +400, Wish Coin +2, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|340
|Tour Coin +400, Wish Coin +2, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|360
|W-tads +400, Wish Coin +2, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|380
|Tour Coin +500, Wish Coin +2, Lottery Ticket +5
|-
|400
|Tour Coin +500, Wish Coin +2, Lottery Ticket +5
|-
|420
|W-tads +500, Wish Coin +2, Lottery Ticket +5
|}

====Rainbow Point====
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Points
!Rewards
|-
|10
|Clone Speedup +4h, Tour Gift Box, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|20
|Clone Speedup +4h, Tour Gift Box, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|30
|Clone Speedup +4h, Tour Gift Box, Golden Pickaxe +3
|-
|40
|Clone Speedup +4h, Tour Gift Box, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|50
|Clone Speedup +4h, Tour Gift Box, Lottery Ticket +3
|-
|60
|Clone Speedup +4h, Tour Gift Box, Wish Coin +2
|-
|70
|Clone Speedup +6h, Tour Gift Box, Lottery Ticket +4
|-
|80
|Clone Speedup +6h, Tour Gift Box, Lottery Ticket +4
|-
|90
|Clone Speedup +6h, Tour Gift Box, Lucky Coin +3
|-
|100
|Clone Speedup +6h, Tour Gift Box, Lottery Ticket +4
|-
|110
|Clone Speedup +6h, Tour Gift Box, Lottery Ticket +4
|-
|120
|Clone Speedup +6h, Tour Gift Box +2, [[Limited Edition Vinyl Record]]
|-
|130
|Clone Speedup +8h, Tour Gift Box +2, Lottery Ticket +6
|-
|140
|Clone Speedup +8h, Tour Gift Box +2, Lottery Ticket +6
|-
|150
|Clone Speedup +8h, Tour Gift Box +2, [[Gear|Eye of Horus]]
|-
|160
|Clone Speedup +8h, Tour Coin +1,000, Lottery Ticket +6
|-
|180
|Clone Speedup +8h, Tour Coin +1,000, Lottery Ticket +6
|-
|200
|Clone Speedup +8h, Tour Coin +1,000, [[ANS Synthesizer]] Frag +40
|-
|220
|Clone Speedup +12h, Tour Coin +1,200, Lottery Ticket +8
|-
|240
|Clone Speedup +12h, Tour Coin +1,200, Lottery Ticket +8
|-
|260
|Clone Speedup +12h, Tour Coin +1,200, Grandmaster Scroll +40
|-
|280
|Clone Speedup +12h, Tour Coin +1,200, Lottery Ticket +8
|-
|300
|Clone Speedup +12h, Tour Coin +1,200, Lottery Ticket +8
|-
|330
|Clone Speedup +12h, Tour Coin +1,200, [[Gear|Crystal of Will]]
|-
|360
|Clone Speedup +16h, Tour Coin +1,600, Lottery Ticket +10
|-
|390
|Clone Speedup +16h, Tour Coin +1,600, Lottery Ticket +10
|-
|420
|Clone Speedup +16h, Tour Coin +1,600, [[ANS Synthesizer]] Frag +40
|-
|450
|Clone Speedup +16h, Tour Coin +1,600, Lottery Ticket +10
|-
|480
|Clone Speedup +16h, Tour Coin +1,600, Lottery Ticket +10
|-
|510
|Clone Speedup +16h, Tour Coin +1,600, Singularity Crystal +3
|-
|540
|Clone Speedup +20h, Tour Coin +2,000, Lottery Ticket +12
|-
|580
|Clone Speedup +20h, Tour Coin +2,000, Lottery Ticket +12
|-
|620
|Clone Speedup +20h, Tour Coin +2,000, [[ANS Synthesizer]] Frag +40
|-
|660
|Clone Speedup +20h, Tour Coin +2,000, Lottery Ticket +12
|-
|700
|Clone Speedup +20h, Tour Coin +2,000, Lottery Ticket +12
|-
|740
|Clone Speedup +20h, Tour Coin +2,000, [[Gear|Crystal of Will]]
|-
|780
|Clone Speedup +1d, Tour Coin +2,400, Lottery Ticket +15
|-
|820
|Clone Speedup +1d, Tour Coin +2,400, Lottery Ticket +15
|-
|860
|Clone Speedup +1d, Tour Coin +2,400, Frankenstein Frag (Minion Skin)
|}
Tour Gift Box contains: Deluxe Sheet Music +30, Tour Coin +200

===Tour Supplement===
Per 1 character level, Points +10<br>Amateur is Free, Professional is $14.99.
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Points
!Amateur
!Professional
|-
|320
|Rainbow Points +10
|[[Tour VIP Ticket]], Organ Chest +100
|-
|340
|Upkeep Set
|Offering Speedup +8h
|-
|340
|Upkeep Set
|Lottery Ticket +5
|-
|380
|Upkeep Set
|Wish Coin +2
|-
|400
|Rainbow Points +10
|Lucky Coin +3, Organ Chest +100
|-
|420
|Upkeep Set
|Offering Speedup +8h
|-
|440
|Upkeep Set
|Lottery Ticket +5
|-
|460
|Upkeep Set
|Wish Coin +2
|-
|480
|Rainbow Points +10
|Orange Fungus Choice Pack, Organ Chest +100
|-
|510
|Upkeep Set
|Offering Speedup +8h
|-
|540
|Upkeep Set
|Lottery Ticket +5
|-
|570
|Upkeep Set
|Wish Coin +2
|-
|600
|Expert Alchemy Case +3
|Master Alchemy Case +5, Organ Chest +100
|-
|630
|Upkeep Set
|Offering Speedup +8h
|-
|660
|Upkeep Set
|Lottery Ticket +5
|-
|690
|Upkeep Set
|Wish Coin +2
|-
|720
|Novice Scroll +10
|Master Scroll +40, Organ Chest +100
|-
|750
|Upkeep Set
|Offering Speedup +8h
|-
|780
|Upkeep Set
|Lottery Ticket +5
|-
|810
|Upkeep Set
|Wish Coin +2
|-
|840
|Offering Speedup +6h
|Dragon Orb, Organ Chest +100
|-
|870
|Upkeep Set
|Offering Speedup +8h
|-
|900
|Upkeep Set
|Lottery Ticket +5
|-
|930
|Upkeep Set
|Wish Coin +2
|-
|960
|Expert Scroll +20
|Relic RF +15, Organ Chest +100
|-
|990
|Upkeep Set
|Offering Speedup +8h
|-
|1,020
|Upkeep Set
|Lottery Ticket +5
|-
|1,060
|Upkeep Set
|Wish Coin +2
|-
|1,100
|Singularity Crystal
|Singularity Crystal +2, Organ Chest +100
|}
Upkeep Set contains: Magic Potion +40, Maintenance Oil +50, Tour Coin +100

===Tour Gacha Machine===
#Each pulling consumes 1 gacha coin.
#For every 10 pullings, you'll get a golden gacha coin in return, which is for the Super Gacha Machine.

====Gacha Rewards====
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!colspan="3"|Gacha Rewards
|-
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |Incense<br>1%||style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |Wish Coin<br>2%
|-
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |Lottery Ticket<br>6%||style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |Offering Speedup<br>6%
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |Gene Speedup +1h<br>10%||style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |Clone Speedup +1h<br>10%||style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |Refine Speedup +1h<br>10%
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg);" |Stone +200<br>14%||style="background-color:var(--green-bg);" |Wood +200<br>14%||style="background-color:var(--green-bg);" |B-tads +2,000<br>27%
|}

====Super Gacha Machine====
[[File:Super Gacha.png|250px]]

= Relic Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|ANS Synthesizer|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Conductor's Baton|green}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Limited Edition Vinyl Record|green}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Tour VIP Ticket|green}}

[[Category:Events]]
